chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Revision Appln.No.S-05 of 2022. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on M.A.No.127/2022 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.129/2022 04. For orders on M.A.No.128/2022 05. For hearing of main case. 17.01.2022 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bijarani, Advocate for the applicants. = * = * = * = * = * = The applicants were found guilty for an offence punishable under Article 4 Prohibition (Enforcement of Hadd) Order, 1979, for being in possession of wine and were convicted and sentenced accordingly by learned trial Magistrate; the appeal preferred by the applicants was dismissed by learned Appellate Court and now they have come before this Court by way of instant criminal revision application, which is incompetent in terms of Article 203DD of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, for the reason that entire revisional jurisdiction in Huddo/Hadd cases lies with Federal Shariat Court, therefore, the office is directed to return the revision application to learned counsel for the applicants together with its annexures, for its presentation before Federal Shariat Court of Pakistan, if so is advised. JUDGE
